items.title: Jupiter drops 13% as fees slide 29% – Can THIS zone save JUP?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's fee decline may impact its liquidity and trading volume, potentially affecting Solana's overall ecosystem activity.

items.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
items.whyYouShouldCare: Coinbase's confidence against Wall Street competition could strengthen its market position, influencing trading dynamics on Solana and other platforms.

items.title: SEC’s tokenized stock plan could force crypto exchanges to answer what investors really own
items.whyYouShouldCare: The SEC's tokenized stock initiative may reshape investor ownership perceptions, impacting how crypto exchanges operate and interact with Solana's market.
